channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 3.0.6 2020-01-12T04:17:15Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.8.1 Update Lightning 4.1.1 Update contributed modules: Update core_context to 1.0-beta1 Update diff to 1.0 Update migrate_tools to 4.5 Update panelizer to 5.0-beta2 Update simple_sitemap to 3.5 Update tarball packaging script to support core 8.
